_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for Phase 3 view-migration scope. Nothing about 'what to do' lives anywhere else.
_meta.state_authority: flip-state.mjs writes the `state` field. The agent NEVER hand-edits state — doing so is a Rule-7 / L08 violation. The file is context; the script makes it binding.
_meta.passing_rule: A view flips to `passing` only when global gates are green AND its `verify` command exits 0. flip-state.sh enforces this; it also demotes a `passing` view back to `not_started` if its verify later fails (regression).
_meta.port_order_hint: Port simplest-first to de-risk early (reporting / studio-map are likely thin); command-center last (most complex). Confirm with a per-view LOC scan before assigning lanes.
_meta.registry_note: verify-phase-3-views.sh should derive its VIEWS array from this file (VIEWS=($(jq -r '.views[]|select(.surface=="operator" and .state!="passing")|.id' feature_list.json))) so there is ONE registry, not two.
